identity.name: Donna Child Fine Art — Magdalena Morey exhibition

narrative.summary: Contemporary paintings celebrating women. March 4–April 28. Boutique gallery, 5.0★ (18 reviews). Off the beaten path but well-reviewed. Worth a deliberate stop for John’s design/architecture/art/food radar.

blocks.title: The Vibe
blocks.body:
⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ "While looking for a unique venue for our intimate wedding, we approached Donna, and knew immediately that her gallery would be perfect.
Donna & team provided invaluable input during the planning process, & handled the details efficiently & professionally.
When the big day arrived, the gallery was stunning, Donna & Rob were the perfect hosts, and we had an evening that exceeded our high expectations!
A very sincere Thank You to everyone at Donna Child Fine Art for helping us create memories that will last a lifetime!
Carrie & Keith"

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ "A few days ago we hosted a fabolous  evening at Donna Child Fine Art Gallery, Rotary Meets the Community.
After the evening we received rave reviews from everyone that was there. I would like to highlight two of the notes we received:
"I totally LOVED your event.  It was inviting, engaging and very ‘classy’."
"Thank you all for an amazing evening last night. Boy, you really know how to throw a fabulous event."
Donna's impeccable taste comes through the specially curated art pieces that embody elegance and artistry. A true exquisite experience.
Thank you Donna and Rebecca."

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ "I highly recommend Donna Child Fine art whether you are looking for a great venue for an event or a home owner looking to frame or purchase art or if you are like me an emerging artist looking for a team to help you get ready for a show.  Donna and the team are true professionals.

As a venue for an event, I can say as an event planner with 40 years experience, it is an ideal place.  It is beautiful, well laid out and has all the facilities you need for a successful event.

As a home owner, Donna and Rebecca helped me pick the right frames to show off my artwork in my new condo. They encouraged me to frame my own art and made it look great.

Then when I decided, on the occasion of my 65th birthday to exhibit my photography, Donna and Rebecca helped me frame my show.  They were understanding of my budget and my goals with the show.  With their help my show was a great success."
